message:
Enhance robot workflow beads with comprehensive testing specs

- wa-35l: Add detailed unit tests, E2E test script, filter flags
- wa-7dd: Add status query tests, verbose mode, error code tests
- wa-55y: Add abort behavior tests, cleanup verification, audit tests
- bd-qvbz: Add blocking deps on wa-35l, wa-7dd, wa-55y (was missing)

All workflow beads now include:
- Specific unit test examples in Rust
- E2E test scripts with detailed logging
- Cross-reference to bd-qvbz for integration tests
- Complete acceptance criteria checklists

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
